name: Sam Okafor
resume_text:
Sam Okafor
Email: sam.okafor.eval@example.com
Backend Engineer, Prism Workflow, 2021-2025
Built Python and FastAPI services for workflow approvals. Designed REST APIs, wrote PostgreSQL migrations, improved retry handling for background jobs, and added pytest coverage for billing webhooks. Partnered with product engineers on API contracts and production incident reviews.
Software Engineer, Prism Workflow, 2019-2021
Maintained internal admin tools and SQL reports.
Skills: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, pytest, reliability.
expected_risks: Distributed systems scale is not detailed
human_notes: Strong backend evidence for non-coding evaluation; interview should validate design reasoning.
